title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Marksandspencer Shop Limited
body: "Application number 5137  Applicant Marks and Spencer Plc objected to the name used by Marksandspencer Shop Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 28 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Marksandspencer Shop Limited is changed to 15180447, LTD. "
